    "Visible weld undercut exceeding allowable limits",
    "Surface porosity in the weld bead",
    "Incomplete fusion between the weld metal and base metal"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Issue a non-conformance report (NCR) for the defective structural welds",
    "Mark the defective weld areas for rejection and rework",
    "Grind out the defective weld metal to sound metal and re-weld per approved WPS",
    "Schedule a follow-up visual and non-destructive testing (NDT) inspection after rework"
  ],
  "rationale": "The structural welds exhibit visible undercut, surface porosity, and incomplete fusion, which violate the visual acceptance criteria of AWS D1.1 for statically or cyclically loaded structures. Because these defects compromise the structural integrity of the load-bearing members, the work fails inspection and requires immediate grinding and re-welding.",
  "references": [
    "AWS D1.1/D1.1M Structural Welding Code - Steel, Section 6 (Inspection) - Visual Inspection Acceptance Criteria"
  ]
